items.title: U.S. says Tehran would be ‘very wise’ to make a deal as Russia, Iran hold naval drills
items.description: It comes shortly after Vice President JD Vance accused Iran of failing to address core U.S. demands during nuclear talks in Geneva, Switzerland.

items.title: Dueling PACs take center stage in midterm elections over AI regulation
items.description: Two groups with opposite missions and backing from different companies are making a New York congressional primary a central battleground.

items.title: 'Do not give away Diego Garcia': Trump attacks the UK over Chagos Islands deal, again
items.description: Trump told the U.K. not to "give away" the Chagos Islands, which is where a joint U.S.-U.K. military base is located.

items.title: Why India joining this U.S.-led tech alliance could help supply chains
items.description: India is joining the U.S.-led Pax Silica initiative, giving Washington its biggest win yet in the race to shape and influence who has access to advanc...

items.title: Trump order pushes glyphosate production; Roundup chemical hated by MAHA
items.description: Secretary of Health and Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s Make America Healthy Again movement is largely opposed to glyphosate.
